name: Sync Receiver Product Inventory with Odoo

parameters.query:
SELECT
      pt.sugarwish_id as
  product_id,
      p.default_code as sku,
      SUM(q.quantity -
  q.reserved_quantity) as
  available_quantity
  FROM stock_quant q
  JOIN product_product p ON
  q.product_id = p.id
  JOIN product_template pt ON
  p.product_tmpl_id = pt.id
  JOIN stock_location l ON
  q.location_id = l.id
  WHERE p.default_code IS NOT NULL
      AND p.active = true
      AND pt.sugarwish_id > 0
      -- Exclude component skus that were showing up
      AND pt.sugarwish_id < 800000
      AND (p.default_code LIKE
  'FG-%' OR p.default_code LIKE
  'SA-%' OR p.default_code LIKE
  'L-B02%')
      AND l.sugarwish_id IS NOT NULL
      AND l.sugarwish_id >= 1
  GROUP BY pt.sugarwish_id,
  p.default_code
  ORDER BY pt.sugarwish_id;

SELECT 
  rp.product_id, 
  rp.sku, 
  oi.inventory,
  oi.updated_at
FROM receiver_products rp
JOIN odoo_inventory oi
  ON oi.product_id = rp.product_id
WHERE rp.inventory_link IS NULL
  AND rp.product_type NOT IN (43, 44)
  AND archive = 0;

nodes.name: Laravel: Update odoo_inventory with Correct Value

main.node: Laravel: Update odoo_inventory with Correct Value
